languages.text: "А, я вижу определенный пробел в познаниях научного синтаксиса. Объект эксперимента — это..."
"Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"
languages.original_text: "А, я вижу определенный пробел в познаниях научного синтаксиса. Объект эксперимента — это..."

traits.locale_text: "Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"
"Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"
"Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"

languages.text: 「ああ、科学的な文法の知識の穴を見つけたようです。生物は…」
languages.original_text: "Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"

traits.locale_text: 「ああ、科学的な文法の知識の穴を見つけたようです。生物は…」

languages.text: “啊，看来我们在您的科学术语库中发现了一个盲区。所谓‘有机体’，是——”
languages.original_text: "Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"

traits.locale_text: “啊，看来我们在您的科学术语库中发现了一个盲区。所谓‘有机体’，是——”

languages.text: «Ah, veo que ha topado con una laguna en su conocimiento del léxico científico. Un organismo es...».
languages.original_text: "Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"

traits.locale_text: «Ah, veo que ha topado con una laguna en su conocimiento del léxico científico. Un organismo es...».

languages.text: "Ah, wie ich sehe, haben wir eine Lücke in Eurem Wissen hinsichtlich der wissenschaftlichen Syntax entdeckt. Ein Organismus ist ..."
languages.original_text: "Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"

traits.locale_text: "Ah, wie ich sehe, haben wir eine Lücke in Eurem Wissen hinsichtlich der wissenschaftlichen Syntax entdeckt. Ein Organismus ist ..."

languages.text: « Ah, je vois que nous avons mis au jour une lacune dans vos connaissances de la terminologie scientifique. Un organisme est... »
languages.original_text: "Ah, I see we have found a lacuna in your knowledge of scientific syntax. An organism is—"

traits.locale_text: « Ah, je vois que nous avons mis au jour une lacune dans vos connaissances de la terminologie scientifique. Un organisme est... »

languages.text: "Ha... Bilimsel söz dizimi birikiminizde bir boşluk bulmuşuz. Organizma..."

traits.locale_text: "Ha... Bilimsel söz dizimi birikiminizde bir boşluk bulmuşuz. Organizma..."
